name: qlist
description: B站近期视频问号弹幕排行榜

scripts.crawl:early: RECENT_DAYS=1 VIEW_THRESHOLD=10000 EARLY_WINDOW_HOURS=12 EARLY_VIEW_THRESHOLD=0 MAX_PAGES_PER_RID=30 node src/crawler.js
scripts.crawl:hot: RECENT_DAYS=3 VIEW_THRESHOLD=10000 EARLY_WINDOW_HOURS=12 EARLY_VIEW_THRESHOLD=0 MAX_PAGES_PER_RID=100 node src/crawler.js
scripts.crawl:backfill: RECENT_DAYS=7 VIEW_THRESHOLD=100000 EARLY_WINDOW_HOURS=0 MAX_PAGES_PER_RID=200 node src/crawler.js
scripts.crawl:month: RECENT_DAYS=30 VIEW_THRESHOLD=100000 EARLY_WINDOW_HOURS=0 MAX_PAGES_PER_RID=500 node src/crawler.js
scripts.crawl:since2026: CRAWL_START_DATE=2026-01-01 VIEW_THRESHOLD=10000 EARLY_WINDOW_HOURS=0 MAX_PAGES_PER_RID=2000 FORCE_RESCAN=1 RID_CONCURRENCY=4 VIDEO_CONCURRENCY=8 PAGE_CONCURRENCY=3 REQUEST_DELAY_MS=500 node src/crawler.js
scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/crawler.js && node --check src/bilibili.js && node --check src/db.js && node --check src/analysis.js && node --check src/backfill-tags.js
scripts.crawl:fast: RID_CONCURRENCY=8 VIDEO_CONCURRENCY=12 PAGE_CONCURRENCY=4 REQUEST_DELAY_MS=300 node src/crawler.js
scripts.crawl:turbo: RID_CONCURRENCY=12 VIDEO_CONCURRENCY=20 PAGE_CONCURRENCY=5 REQUEST_DELAY_MS=150 node src/crawler.js
